overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a warrior character traversing a misty ancient Chinese temple complex at night. The character walks from an open courtyard through a wooden gate and narrow stone passages, finally entering a lit temple building with red lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty temple garden courtyard with scattered ancient trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the misty courtyard toward the distant pagoda tower

entered.detail: massive gnarled tree with bare branches towering over the left side of the courtyard
multi-tiered traditional East Asian pagoda visible through the mist in the distance
tall stone boundary wall running along the right side of the garden
glowing red lanterns hanging from the temple building on the left
traditional wooden temple structure with curved roof on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide, misty temple garden at night. Ancient trees loom on the left while a stone wall borders the right. In the distance, a pagoda tower is visible through the fog, and red lanterns glow warmly from a building on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional wooden temple gate with red lanterns

events.description: approaching the large wooden temple gate structure with curved roof
passing under the gate roof causes temporary shadow and darker lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the wooden gate passage framed by stone pillars and red lanterns

entered.detail: large traditional wooden gate with curved tile roof and heavy pillars
ornate curved roof of the gate structure silhouetted against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through a traditional wooden temple gate. The structure features stone pillars and glowing red lanterns. As the character moves under the gate roof, the lighting darkens temporarily before opening up again on the other side.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone-walled passage between high temple walls

events.description: entering the narrow enclosed corridor with high stone walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow stone corridor toward the large tree visible above the walls

entered.detail: tall weathered stone wall forming the left boundary of the narrow passage
tall weathered stone wall forming the right boundary of the narrow passage
massive dead tree with sprawling bare branches visible above the wall against the sky

segments.scene_description: After passing through the gate, the character enters a narrow stone corridor enclosed by high walls on both sides. The path is dimly lit, with a large dead tree visible above the walls against the night sky. The atmosphere is confined and atmospheric.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple building entrance with illuminated red lanterns

events.description: turning right toward the temple building entrance with glowing red lanterns
ascending stone steps and entering the temple building through the wooden doorway

agents.ego_description: turning toward the lit entrance, ascending the stone steps, and walking into the temple building

entered.detail: traditional wooden temple entrance with steps leading up to the doorway
bright red paper lantern glowing warmly on the left side of the entrance
bright red paper lantern glowing warmly on the right side of the entrance
dark wooden door frame leading into the interior of the temple building

segments.scene_description: The character turns right toward a temple building entrance framed by two glowing red lanterns. After ascending the stone steps, the character approaches and enters through the wooden doorway, transitioning from the outdoor passage into the building's interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty temple garden that gradually narrows into a confined stone corridor before entering a lit sanctuary. It begins with the character walking through a wide, fog-shrouded garden where ancient trees and a distant pagoda loom under the glow of red lanterns. As the character approaches a traditional wooden gate, the camera moves under its heavy roof, causing the lighting to darken momentarily before opening up again on the other side. The scene then shifts into a narrow stone corridor enclosed by high walls, where the atmosphere becomes confined beneath the silhouette of a large dead tree. Finally, the camera turns right toward a temple entrance framed by glowing lanterns, ascending stone steps to pass through the wooden doorway and into the building's interior.
